question_intent: average charge amount for members in the North American region who have made payments and have charges in the Lodging category

plan.question_intent: average charge amount for members in the North American region who have made payments and have charges in the Lodging category
plan.detail_query: SELECT leaf_1.member_no, leaf_1.charge_no, leaf_1.charge_amt FROM (SELECT m.member_no, c.charge_no, c.charge_amt FROM member AS m JOIN charge AS c ON m.member_no = c.member_no JOIN payment AS p ON m.member_no = p.member_no JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no WHERE (r.region_name = 'North American') AND (cat.category_desc = 'Lodging') GROUP BY m.member_no, c.charge_no, c.charge_amt HAVING COUNT(p.payment_no) > 0) AS leaf_1

blocks.name: leaf_1
join_clauses: JOIN charge AS c ON m.member_no = c.member_no
JOIN payment AS p ON m.member_no = p.member_no
JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
blocks.notes: members in North American region with payments and Lodging charges

blocks.notes: average charge amount for the filtered members

SELECT m.member_no, c.charge_no, c.charge_amt
FROM member AS m
JOIN charge AS c ON m.member_no = c.member_no
LEFT JOIN payment AS p ON m.member_no = p.member_no
JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
WHERE (r.region_name = 'North American' OR r.region_name = 'South American') AND (cat.category_desc = 'Lodging' OR cat.category_desc = 'Meals')
GROUP BY m.member_no, c.charge_no, c.charge_amt
HAVING (COUNT(p.payment_no) > 0)

build_logs.notes: average charge amount for the filtered members

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT m.member_no, c.charge_no, c.charge_amt
FROM member AS m
JOIN charge AS c ON m.member_no = c.member_no
LEFT JOIN payment AS p ON m.member_no = p.member_no
JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
WHERE (r.region_name = 'North American' OR r.region_name = 'South American') AND (cat.category_desc = 'Lodging' OR cat.category_desc = 'Meals')
GROUP BY m.member_no, c.charge_no, c.charge_amt
HAVING (COUNT(p.payment_no) >= 0)) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.charge_amt)
FROM (SELECT m.member_no, c.charge_no, c.charge_amt
FROM member AS m
JOIN charge AS c ON m.member_no = c.member_no
LEFT JOIN payment AS p ON m.member_no = p.member_no
JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
WHERE (r.region_name = 'North American' OR r.region_name = 'South American') AND (cat.category_desc = 'Lodging' OR cat.category_desc = 'Meals')
GROUP BY m.member_no, c.charge_no, c.charge_amt
HAVING (COUNT(p.payment_no) >= 0)) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.payment_amt)
FROM (SELECT m.region_no, r.region_name, p.payment_no, p.payment_dt, p.payment_amt, c.category_no, cat.category_desc FROM payment AS p JOIN member AS m ON p.member_no = m.member_no JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no LEFT JOIN charge AS c ON p.member_no = c.member_no LEFT JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no WHERE (cat.category_desc = 'Lodging' OR cat.category_desc IS NULL) GROUP BY m.region_no, r.region_name, p.payment_no, p.payment_dt, p.payment_amt, c.category_no, cat.category_desc) AS leaf_1

SELECT SUM(leaf_1.charge_amt) AS total_charges
FROM (SELECT c.charge_no, c.charge_dt, c.charge_amt, m.member_no, r.region_name, cat.category_desc
FROM charge AS c
JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
WHERE (cat.category_desc = 'Meals') AND (r.region_name IN ('North American', 'South American', 'Scandanavian')) AND (strftime('%Y-%m', c.charge_dt) = '1999-08')) AS leaf_1

question: What is the average charge amount for charges that belong to members in North American or South American regions, are in the Lodging or Meals categories, and have at least zero associated payments?
